text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The center part? You mean the highlight of the performance? The bit
where you come to the middle to dance?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You want me to do that part?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Y...yeah. I've been think'n of ask'n you from the start. I'm not right for
that part!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Put yours on so we can line up.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I... can't hold a candle to you gals.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But I can't back out now without caus'n problems. So please, just put
me in the background—The spotlight should belong to you two!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Really? Okay, I can do that part.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: If that's what you really want.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Curren...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Yukino! What's up with you? You were acting kinda
strange back there.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's noth'n! I was just... so amazed by how pretty the costumes
looked!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: But I'm just peachy now!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I played it down, but... I should really tell City since we're dancing
t'gether.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: (I am doing the right thing, aren't I? Yeah, sure I am...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Hey, you. Free right now? Come with me.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: What? ...WHAT?! Y-you... You mean me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Calm down. I'm not gonna eat you. I just want to race. Come with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's only so much I can hone my skill on my own. I need the feeling
of chasing prey. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: What did you mean by "prey"? Ah, wait, Briaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: RRRAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... S-sorry... I wasn't much help...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(Brian is super strong... But that's not th'only reason I lost. My legs...
feel weird today...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Where's your instinct?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Eh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Instinct. It's what's left behind once you shave away all the
unnecessary stuff. It's what drives you at the most basic level.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Most racers unleash that instinct on the track, but I didn't see an
ounce of it in you tonight.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So what is it you desire? You wouldn't be racing if there wasn't something.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, forget it. I'm going to run some more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The road ahead is really dark. Don't fall over on your way back.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: (My instincts...)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: ...What do I want to do?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(The night sky is far brighter in my hometown than it is here. It's like a
sea of stars so deep you could dive right into it.)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(But the brightest stars in my eyes were the city girls. I admired them
so much through the TV screen.)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(Walk'n tall and confident, ambitious, stand'n on their own two feet...
Just like City, actually.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I've made up my mind. I'm going to do this right!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I get it now... City's so beautiful 'cause she's her own person mak'n her
own decision.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(I've never heard her doubting herself and shy'n away from a
challenge. I must look so silly, chicken'n out of center stage.)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(Truth is... if I do what Brian said and remove all the fluff, what I
really want... when all's said and done is...)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I wanna be...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: More than anyth'n, I wanna be... an honest-to-goodness... city girl!
